text:
Context7 — 44K stars, #1 MCP server — scored 39.5 out of 100 on schema quality.

its resolve-library-id description is 2,006 characters. a full user manual shoved into a schema field. 510 tokens per tool.

PostgreSQL: 46 tokens, A+. same protocol.

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html

25 MCP servers graded. the top 4 most popular (Context7, Chrome DevTools, GitHub Official, Blender) all score D or below.

439 tools. 73K tokens. minimalism wins every time.

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html

Playwright (Microsoft): 78 tools, 7,502 tokens, grade D+.
Context7 (Upstash): 2 tools, 1,020 tokens, grade F.
PostgreSQL: 1 tool, 46 tokens, grade A+.

popularity and quality are completely uncorrelated in MCP. the most popular server is nearly the worst graded.

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html
